name: New-patient intake → SMS follow-up → booking + email confirmation
description: When a new-patient intake form is submitted, wait 2 minutes, start a warm SMS conversation to thank the patient by name, confirm their insurance status, and capture their preferred time. Then send an email confirmation with the clinic address and the new-patient consultation booking link. Note: Seldon does not currently expose an MCP tool to create a booking on a patient's behalf, so the agent sends the public Cal.diy booking link instead of hard-booking the slot.

steps.initial_message: Hi {{first_name}}, it's Bright Smile Dental 🦷 Thanks so much for reaching out — we'll take great care of you, no pressure and no judgment. When would you ideally like to come in for your free new-patient consultation? Also, just to confirm: do you have dental insurance (yes / no / not sure)?
steps.exit_when: The patient has shared (a) a preferred day or time window AND (b) confirmed whether they have insurance (yes, no, or unsure).

extract.preferred_time: string — patient's stated preferred day/time window for the consultation

args.subject: Your Bright Smile visit — next steps
args.body:
Hi {{first_name}},

Thanks again for reaching out to Bright Smile Dental — we're looking forward to meeting you.

Based on our text chat, you're looking to come in around: {{preferred_time}}. Insurance on file: {{has_insurance}}.

To lock in the exact slot that works best for you, please pick a time on our new-patient consultation calendar here:
https://brightsmile.app.seldonframe.com/book/new-patient-consultation

Your first consultation is completely free, and cleanings use the latest painless tech — so you can relax.

📍 Clinic address: Bright Smile Dental — please see the address and parking details on our site: https://brightsmile.app.seldonframe.com

Any questions, just reply to this email or text us back.

Warmly,
The Bright Smile team
